AI Agents & Frameworks.title: VectifyAI Launches Mafin 2.5 and PageIndex: Achieving 98.7% Financial RAG Accuracy with a New Open-Source Vectorless Tree Indexing.
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: VectifyAI has launched Mafin 2.5 and PageIndex, new open-source vectorless tree indexing tools designed to achieve 98.7% accuracy in financial RAG applications. This release offers a novel approach to improving retrieval-augmented generation performance.

AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: ByteDance AI research introduces a novel reasoning method that maps molecular bonds to stabilize long chain-of-thought performance and improve reinforcement learning training. This approach moves beyond keyword imitation to enhance AI reasoning capabilities.

AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: New Google AI research proposes a "Deep-Thinking Ratio" to significantly improve LLM accuracy while simultaneously reducing inference costs by half. This method offers a more efficient approach to deploying high-performing language models.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: A small number of samples can poison LLMs of any size
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Research indicates that even a small number of carefully crafted samples can "poison" Large Language Models (LLMs), regardless of their size. This highlights critical security vulnerabilities that need to be addressed in the development of robust AI agents.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Done Deal: Nakamoto Closes $107M All-Stock Takeover of CEO David Bailey's BTC Inc. & UTXO

Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Indian banks are planning to implement blockchain technology to streamline funding for Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs). This initiative seeks to improve efficiency in lending and mitigate default risks.
